methodology: Normalized, committed benchmark subsets. Robust unsupervised baselines are trained only on benign train rows per dataset family; test rows are scored from median/MAD feature deviation.

datasets.license_note: Committed rows are normalized demo subset features, not raw packet/session exports.

datasets.source_name: LANL Unified Host and Network Dataset
datasets.license_note: Committed rows are normalized demo subset features, not raw authentication logs.
Committed rows are normalized demo subset features, not raw sensor traces.
